entities.name: SWEET GRAIN SORGHUM
entities.description: An under-harvested crop produced mainly for its sweet grains in the pasty stage

entities.name: SORGHUM BICOLOR
entities.description: The scientific name for sweet grain sorghum

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The level and structure of genetic variation within the sweet grain sorghum population

entities.name: BURKINA FASO
entities.description: The country where the sweet grain sorghum accessions were sourced

entities.name: MICROSATELLITE MARKERS
entities.description: Polymorphic markers used to evaluate the genetic diversity of the accessions

entities.name: ALLELES
entities.description: Variants of the microsatellite markers identified in the analysis

entities.name: NEI DIVERSITY
entities.description: A measure of genetic diversity, found to be moderate (0.474) in the collection

entities.name: HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: A measure of genetic variation, found to be low (0.031) in the collection

entities.name: WRIGHT'S FIXATION INDEX
entities.description: A measure of inbreeding (Fis), found to be very high (0.934)

entities.name: FST
entities.description: A measure of genetic differentiation between groups

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: A measure of the distance between genetic groups

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs in Burkina Faso that can exploit the identified genetic diversity
